rationale: The candidate 7215e105 (gpt-oss-120b:nitro) provides the most natural and technically accurate translation, maintaining Dan's direct and engaging style. It correctly handles complex MDX structures and asset paths. The current translation in the zh/index.mdx file already incorporated most of the previous judge's suggestions (translating '50 reads per second' etc.), but missed the first option '100 reads per second', which I've added as a suggestion for full consistency.
